meta.intent: Create the first broad three-target board that still reads in clear rescue order instead of collapsing into simultaneous chores.
meta.expectedPath: Rescue the lower-left puppy first, pivot through the center target second, and leave the safer top-right puppy for last.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player half-opens all three lanes, burns actions without finishing any route, and turns readable triage into self-authored overload.
meta.whatItProves: Three targets can create triage pressure without becoming unreadable noise.
meta.notes: The board is intentionally broad and sparse between target clusters so players can verbalize order at first read.
